description: Configure GPredict to track the 6 COSMIC-2/FORMOSAT-7 radio occultation satellites from a new Taipei ground station. Create a ground station named 'Taipei_CWA' (25.0380 N, 121.5030 E, 9m) and set it as the default ground station. Set the global time format to UTC. Configure the map view to display the terminator line and ground tracks for exactly 2 orbits ahead. Create a tracking module named 'COSMIC-2' containing the 6 satellites: FORMOSAT-7 FM1 (44327), FM2 (44328), FM3 (44329), FM4 (44330), FM5 (44331), and FM6 (44332). Ensure the COSMIC-2 module is active and displaying the map. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
